briefs.title: Council to Consider Burnaby Housing Authority's 2025 Financials and 2026 Budget
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive the Burnaby Housing Authority's first audited financial statements and its 2026 operating budget — a key step that would unlock $2 million in City funding to keep the housing agency running and advancing two rental housing projects.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — it could affect housing supply and rental availability in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Housing Authority 2026 operating funding — council receipt meeting
BHA $25 million GIC investment matures — Burnaby Housing Authority
